fields.name: effective_date
fields.description: date the agreement becomes effective, usually stated in the opening paragraph

fields.name: jurisdiction
fields.description: US state whose law governs the agreement, from the governing-law clause — the state name only, e.g. 'New York'

fields.name: term
fields.description: duration of the agreement as stated, e.g. '2 years' — the length only, not start/end dates

fields.name: party
fields.description: every party (company or person) entering the agreement — list ALL of them
